spec.description: AzureASOManagedMachinePoolSpec defines the desired state of AzureASOManagedMachinePool.

providerIDList.description:
ProviderIDList is the list of cloud provider IDs for the instances. It fulfills Cluster API's machine
pool infrastructure provider contract.

resources.description: Resources are embedded ASO resources to be managed by this resource.

status.description: AzureASOManagedMachinePoolStatus defines the observed state of AzureASOManagedMachinePool.

ready.description:
Ready represents whether or not the infrastructure is ready to be used. It fulfills Cluster API's
machine pool infrastructure provider contract.

replicas.description:
Replicas is the current number of provisioned replicas. It fulfills Cluster API's machine pool
infrastructure provider contract.

resource.description: StatusResource is a handle to a resource.

exampleYAML:
apiVersion: infrastructure.cluster.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1
kind: AzureASOManagedMachinePool
metadata:
  name: example-azureasomanagedmachinepool
  namespace: default
spec:
  providerIDList: []
  resources: []
